goal: Ship v8.8 External Runtime Reproduction and Rollback Proof.
risk: AOF could confuse approved execution plans with reproducible and rollback-ready execution evidence.
loss_boundary: No v8.8 release claim unless reproduction and rollback proof audits pass and production execution remains explicitly not proven.
acceptance_gates: negative rollback test rejects unsupported rollback
evidence_plan: schemas, commands, focused tests, self-hosting proof artifacts, Council review, release-state audit
stop_conditions: stop if approval is treated as reproduction
stop if rollback plan text is treated as rollback proof
stop if production safety is implied
